channel.title: expansion on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in expansion on My Hugo

item.title: Bash Recipes - Parameter
item.description: Transform os=linux osx=darwin osb= brace expansion example result description ${var:-word} ${os:-aix} linux $var if it is unset or null, else word ${osb:-aix} aix (osb is null) ${osc}:-aix} aix (osc is unset) ${var:=word} ${os:=aix} linux $var if it is unset or null, else var=word and return ${osb:=aix} aix in addition osb=aix ${var:+word} ${os:+aix} aix word if $var is unset or null, else null (var is not changed) ${osb:+aix} (osb is null) ${var:?
